steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: ”Constantly evolving” and “change in size and shape” — the passage emphasizes the delta's continuous transformation.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean continuously changing — the colon after it signals that the rest of the sentence will define it, and the rest describes constant evolution and shifts in size and shape. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Dynamic: "the delta is dynamic" — dynamic means characterized by constant change and activity, which directly matches the description of channels and land strips that constantly shift. ✓
  • Choice B — Immutable: "the delta is immutable" — immutable means unchanging or fixed, the direct opposite of "constantly evolving." ✗
  • Choice C — Sustainable: "the delta is sustainable" — sustainable means able to be maintained long-term, which addresses durability, not the pattern of change the passage describes. ✗
  • Choice D — Unrivaled: "the delta is unrivaled" — unrivaled means without equal, implying a comparison the passage never makes. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
